paragraphs.text: who builds fast, reliable interfaces and enjoys taking on the more challenging parts of a product: real-time systems, AI-driven experiences, and SDKs other teams build on.
, building AI-powered healthcare tools used by thousands of doctors every day. Before that,
took me across e-commerce, social, and real-time apps — comfortable across the stack, but most at home in the frontend.

I care about interfaces that feel effortless and code that's easy to live with. In the AI era, the frontend work I find most interesting is shaping live, streaming model output into something that feels instant, editable, and trustworthy.
— Ajay Kumar Garg Engineering College (AKTU), Class of 2025 · CGPA 9.0/10.

facts.text: Top-5 finalist — PARADIGM E-Summit National Hackathon
